name: ingest_docs
description: Ingests a list of documents into a LanceDB table. It is critical that the metadata must be a string literal

docs.description: A string or a list of strings to ingest.

name: query_table
description: Query a LanceDB table with a query string and return the top k results.

top_k.description: The number of results to return. Defaults to 5.

query_type.description: The type of query to perform. Defaults to 'vector'.

name: table_details
description: Get the details of a LanceDB table.

table_name.description: The name of the table to get the details of. Defaults to 'lancedb_table'.

db_uri.description: The URI of the LanceDB database. Defaults to '~/lancedb'.
